diagnosis.title: diagnosis
diagnosis.description: The diagnostic assessment of the asset health issue.

severity.title: severity
severity.description: The severity level of the diagnosed issue (e.g., Low, Medium, High, Critical).

recommendedAction.title: recommendedAction
recommendedAction.description: The recommended course of action to resolve the issue.

allMetrics.title: allMetrics
allMetrics.description: A consolidated summary of all telemetry metrics for the asset.

success.title: success
success.description: Indicates whether the diagnosis was completed successfully.

message.title: message
message.description: A status or error message about the diagnosis operation.
